hero.headline: Engineering Nature's Blueprint for Tomorrow
hero.subtitle: We harness the power of synthetic biology to develop sustainable, bio-based solutions that address the world's most urgent challenges.

about.label: Who We Are
about.heading: Biology as a Force for Change
about.text: At Helinx, we believe the answers to our greatest challenges already exist in nature. Our world-class team of scientists and engineers unlocks biological processes to create next-generation ingredients and materials — replacing harmful synthetics with elegant, sustainable alternatives.

technology.label: What We Do
technology.heading: Precision Biology at Scale
technology.text: Our proprietary platforms — spanning cell factory engineering, precision fermentation, and advanced enzyme technology — enable us to produce high-performance bio-based ingredients at commercial scale. We transform what nature provides into what industry demands.

impact.label: Our Mission
impact.heading: Building a Regenerative Future
impact.text: Every product we develop is measured against its impact on the planet. From reducing carbon emissions to eliminating hazardous chemicals from supply chains, our work is driven by the belief that industrial progress and environmental stewardship are not at odds — they're inseparable.

cta.heading: Ready to Collaborate?
cta.text: We partner with forward-thinking companies to bring bio-based solutions to market. Let's explore how we can work together.
